name: presto
description: Desktop shell for Presto Pro Tools workflows
author: Luminous Layers

scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:python
scripts.test:node: node --test frontend/electron/test/*.test.mjs frontend/host/test/*.test.mjs frontend/tauri/test/*.test.mjs host-plugin-runtime/test/*.test.mjs packages/contracts/test/*.test.mjs plugins/official/*/test/*.test.mjs
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run tauri:build:frontend && npm run tauri:build:sidecar && tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run tauri:build:frontend && npm run tauri:build:sidecar && tauri build
scripts.developer:smoke:read: npm run tauri:build:frontend && npm run tauri:build:sidecar
scripts.developer:smoke:write: npm run tauri:build:frontend && npm run tauri:build:sidecar
scripts.developer:smoke:strip-silence: npm run tauri:build:frontend && npm run tauri:build:sidecar
scripts.developer:smoke:core-io: npm run tauri:build:frontend && npm run tauri:build:sidecar
scripts.stage1:smoke:track-write: npm run tauri:build:frontend && npm run tauri:build:sidecar
scripts.stage1:smoke: npm run developer:smoke:read && npm run developer:smoke:write && npm run stage1:smoke:core-io && npm run developer:smoke:strip-silence && npm run stage1:smoke:track-write
